scripts.build: node scripts/sync-version.js && npx prisma generate --schema ../../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npx next build
scripts.build:node: node scripts/sync-version.js && npx prisma generate --schema ../../packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npx next build
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.dev:full: npx concurrently "npm run dev" "npm run dev:api"
